title: The Considered Gardener's Kit
intro: Built around what serious gardeners actually reach for — tools forged to outlast decades, workwear designed for the job, and footwear worth wearing into the dirt. Sourced from independent makers and specialty retailers, not the garden center aisle.

items.title: Plasticana French Recycled Hemp Garden Clogs in Sepia
items.note: Made in France from recycled plastic and hemp — runs large so size down; the clog gardeners ask about when they see someone else wearing them.

items.title: Gardenheir Italian Garden Clogs in British Green
items.note: Durable EVA with a leather-look finish made in Italy — available in 11 colorways including tones that don't show mud.

items.title: Birkenstock Super Birki 2.0
items.note: Designed for long hours on wet surfaces — waterproof polyurethane upper, cork-latex footbed, certified slip-resistant outsole; what people who garden professionally choose.

items.title: Niwaki Garden Shears
items.note: SK steel blades on Japanese white oak handles — balanced for sustained pruning work, not the featherweight feel of hardware-store shears.

items.title: Niwaki Daikiba Secateurs with Canvas Sheath
items.note: Drop-forged SLD semi-stainless steel — an accessible entry into Niwaki's cutting tools that includes a canvas sheath and holds an edge.

items.title: Felco 2 Classic Bypass Pruner
items.note: In continuous production since 1948 — fully repairable with replacement parts always available, lifetime warranty, the pruner that enthusiasts reach for when they stop experimenting.

items.title: Japanese Typewriter Cotton Gardening Chemise in Oxford Blue
items.note: Tightly woven typewriter cotton made in Japan that naturally repels water — unisex sizing XXS–XXL, available in six colorways including Moss and Ink.

items.title: Le Laboureur French Cotton Easy Short in Lagoon
items.note: 100% cotton with an elasticated waist, made in France with a design unchanged since the 1970s — the non-precious garden short.

items.title: Sneeboer x Gardenheir Spade with Steps
items.note: Dutch-forged steel with turned steps added in the Gardenheir collaboration — the spade serious growers buy once and keep for decades.

items.title: DeWit Dutch Trowel
items.note: Swedish Boron steel blade on an FSC-certified European Ash handle, handcrafted in the Netherlands since 1898 — the trowel that comes up every time someone asks for a recommendation.

items.title: Barebones Hori Hori Ultimate
items.note: The digging knife that replaces three other tools — handles transplanting, weeding, and division, and comes up consistently in gardening communities as the one to get.

warnings: Le Laboureur French Moleskin Work Short in Ecru ($118) was featured in the source email but is currently sold out at Gardenheir — add when restocked to strengthen the workwear section.
Workwear section has only 2 items due to the sold-out Moleskin Short; consider adding a garden apron from Fog Linen Work or a similar Japanese linen workwear brand.
Niwaki GR Pro Secateurs ($118–$128) are also sold out at time of research — worth adding as the premium pruner option when back in stock.
The Gardenheir April email also featured vintage decorative items (antique dog painting, carved horse plaque, greeting cards) — excluded as they do not fit an enthusiast-use frame.
Nora garden clogs were found largely sold out across US retailers and excluded; re-check Terrain/Anthropologie if availability improves.
